section.heading: Designation of chief State election official

content.p: Each State shall designate a State officer or employee as the chief State election official to be responsible for coordination of State responsibilities under this chapter.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 1973gg–8 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
